hero.title: Turn your notes into AI flashcards that actually help you study.
hero.subtitle: Notely summarizes content, detects key concepts and builds clean flashcards from your notes in seconds.

preview.title: AI study mode
preview.copy: A long note becomes a focused set of questions and answers automatically.
preview.secondaryCopy: Key terms, definitions and quiz prompts are pulled straight from your material.

one.title: AI flashcard creation
one.text: Turn notes into clear study cards automatically.

two.title: Important points detected
two.text: Key concepts and takeaways are pulled right out of your material.

three.title: Mobile-first
three.text: Review cards anywhere with calm layouts and fast repetition.

survey.title: Help shape the app
survey.subtitle: We're building this with the community from the start.

questions.price: How much would you be willing to pay?

cta.title: Get early access before the public launch.
cta.subtitle: Join the list for launch updates and first access.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: This page explains how personal data is processed on this website.
privacyPage.sectionOneText: The responsible party for data processing on this website is Notely, Tim Rothämel, Dammstraße 32, 37339 Breitenworbis, Germany.
privacyPage.sectionTwoText: We process data that you voluntarily submit through the early access form or the survey, such as email addresses, feedback, device type and product preferences.
privacyPage.sectionThreeText: The submitted data is used to manage the waitlist, improve the product and understand which features are most relevant to future users.
privacyPage.sectionFourText: Submitted data is stored via Supabase. We only keep the information as long as it is necessary for product development, communication or legal obligations.
privacyPage.sectionFiveText: You have the right to request information about stored personal data, correction, deletion or restriction of processing. You may also object to processing at any time.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: If you want to get in touch about the product, early access or legal topics, use the options below.
contactPage.emailText: For general questions, feedback or privacy requests, write to us directly.
contactPage.instagramText: Follow product updates, launch notes and early previews.
contactPage.responseText: We usually reply within a few business days.

messages.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.emailSuccess: You are on the early access list.
messages.surveySuccess: Thanks. Your feedback has been saved.
messages.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
messages.emailExists: This email is already on the waitlist.
